meaning: n.地窖,地下室,酒窖,藏酒量
examples: Suddenly she dashed down to the cellar.
He shone the flashlight around the cellar.
Water had started to leak into the cellar.
With 76 cellar-doors, wine tastings are within easy reach and cycling between them has become increasingly popular.
Stack some cases of the wines below in your cellar and ride the thing out.
